name: lofersil-landing-page
description: LOFERSIL Landing Page - Static TypeScript site for Vercel deployment

scripts.build: npm run build:bundle && npm run build:css && npm run build:copy && npm run build:seo
scripts.build:copy: mkdir -p dist/scripts && cp index.prod.html dist/index.html && cp -r assets dist/ && cp -r src/locales dist/ && cp -r api dist/ && cp privacy.html dist/ && cp terms.html dist/ && cp assets/offline.html dist/ && cp node_modules/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js dist/dompurify.min.js && cp dist/scripts/module-detection.js dist/scripts/module-detection.js
scripts.build:seo:
echo '<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9"><url><loc>https://lofersil-landing-page.vercel.app/</loc><lastmod>'$(date -Iseconds)'</lastmod><changefreq>monthly</changefreq><priority>1.0</priority></url></urlset>' > dist/sitemap.xml && echo 'User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://lofersil-landing-page.vercel.app/sitemap.xml' > dist/robots.txt
scripts.build:dev: npm run build:bundle && postcss src/styles/main.css -o dist/main.css

author: LOFERSIL
